atomic_goal: Add a short project scope note stating v2 is simulation-only and uses non-destructive tracking/capture-radius success semantics.
acceptance_criteria: README or docs include: simulation-only; no payload/weapon behavior; success means proximity/track hold, not impact or damage.
suggested_tests: Docs grep confirms terms exist.

atomic_goal: Create a feature branch named drone-intercept-3d-v2 or equivalent.
acceptance_criteria: Git branch exists and current work is isolated from main.
suggested_tests: git status and git branch confirm branch.

atomic_goal: Snapshot the current successful environment behavior before changing v2 code.
acceptance_criteria: Existing env can still be run or a checkpoint/commit/tag preserves the known-good state.
suggested_tests: Run previous env smoke test.

atomic_goal: Create a v2 implementation area without breaking v1.
acceptance_criteria: New files/classes use v2 names; v1 imports/tests continue to pass.
suggested_tests: Run all existing tests or import checks.

atomic_goal: Document required Python packages for Gymnasium/PufferLib training and rendering.
acceptance_criteria: requirements/README lists gymnasium, numpy, pytest, optional matplotlib/render extras, and any existing project deps.
suggested_tests: Fresh environment install instructions are present.

atomic_goal: Add a short Definition of Done checklist for every atomic task.
acceptance_criteria: Checklist includes tests, deterministic seeding, no regressions, and readable docs for changed behavior.
suggested_tests: Docs contain a reusable DoD checklist.

atomic_goal: Create a DroneIntercept3DConfig dataclass or equivalent config object.
acceptance_criteria: Config centralizes world bounds, dt, max steps, drone limits, target limits, obstacle counts, sensor ranges, reward weights, and curriculum level.
suggested_tests: Unit test default config values are importable and sane.

atomic_goal: Add deterministic random seed handling for reset and obstacle generation.
acceptance_criteria: Same seed creates same agent spawn, target spawn, and obstacle layout.
suggested_tests: Reset twice with same seed and compare generated state.

atomic_goal: Register a new environment id, e.g. DroneIntercept3D-v2, without replacing v1.
acceptance_criteria: gymnasium.make or project factory can instantiate v2; v1 still works.
suggested_tests: Smoke test env creation for v1 and v2.

atomic_goal: Define the v2 action space as normalized continuous controls.
acceptance_criteria: Action space supports bounded acceleration/thrust commands and yaw-rate command, all in [-1, 1].
suggested_tests: action_space.sample passes step without shape/type errors.

atomic_goal: Define a stable observation vector schema and document every index.
acceptance_criteria: Observation schema includes self kinematics, target visibility fields, last-seen fields, obstacle rays, and timing fields.
suggested_tests: Observation shape matches observation_space; docs list indices.

atomic_goal: Standardize the info dictionary returned by step.
acceptance_criteria: info contains named debug values: distance_to_target, target_visible, collision, success_hold_steps, reward_terms, nearest_obstacle_distance.
suggested_tests: Step once and assert required keys exist.

atomic_goal: Represent reward components as named terms before summing.
acceptance_criteria: Reward code produces a dict of component values and total reward equals the sum.
suggested_tests: Unit test reward sum equals total.

atomic_goal: Replace 2D point state with 3D agent position and velocity.
acceptance_criteria: Agent state tracks x,y,z and vx,vy,vz as float32 within world bounds.
suggested_tests: Reset/step observation includes nonzero 3D state.

atomic_goal: Add agent yaw/heading state.
acceptance_criteria: Agent has yaw angle and yaw rate or commanded yaw-rate state used by perception/rendering.
suggested_tests: Yaw changes when yaw action is applied.

atomic_goal: Implement limited acceleration instead of instant position jumps.
acceptance_criteria: Action maps to acceleration bounded by config; velocity integrates over dt.
suggested_tests: Repeated forward action increases velocity up to cap.

atomic_goal: Implement max velocity clipping.
acceptance_criteria: Agent speed cannot exceed configured max_speed.
suggested_tests: Apply max action for many steps and assert speed <= cap.

atomic_goal: Implement max yaw-rate clipping.
acceptance_criteria: Yaw command is bounded and integrated over dt.
suggested_tests: Yaw-rate cannot exceed config cap.

atomic_goal: Add gravity-neutral hover assumption for v2.
acceptance_criteria: Default no-action behavior does not fall; this remains a simplified drone control abstraction.
suggested_tests: No-action step keeps altitude approximately stable unless wind/drift is enabled.

atomic_goal: Implement 3D world bounds and out-of-bounds detection.
acceptance_criteria: Leaving bounds sets termination or failure flag according to config.
suggested_tests: Force position outside bounds and assert termination/failure.

atomic_goal: Model the agent body as a vertical capsule/cylinder abstraction.
acceptance_criteria: Config includes body_radius, body_height, and rotor_span_radius.
suggested_tests: Geometry helper returns expected radius/height values.

atomic_goal: Use rotor_span_radius for conservative obstacle collision checks.
acceptance_criteria: Collision checks use outer rotor span, not only center point.
suggested_tests: Obstacle near center but outside/inside rotor radius behaves correctly.

atomic_goal: Compute nearest obstacle clearance from rotor span.
acceptance_criteria: nearest_obstacle_distance accounts for rotor radius and becomes negative on collision.
suggested_tests: Known obstacle positions produce expected clearance.

atomic_goal: Render the v2 drone as a simple cylindrical body plus rotor span marker in debug views.
acceptance_criteria: Render/debug output visually distinguishes body center and collision radius.
suggested_tests: Manual render smoke test runs without crashing.

atomic_goal: Document that this is a simplified body model, not individual motor physics.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain why full motor physics is deferred.
suggested_tests: Docs contain body model assumptions.

atomic_goal: Implement hand-launch start distribution.
acceptance_criteria: Agent spawns near low hand height with small randomized x/y and heading.
suggested_tests: Seeded reset places agent within launch box.

atomic_goal: Implement target spawn above and away from the agent.
acceptance_criteria: Target spawn has higher altitude than agent and minimum horizontal/3D separation.
suggested_tests: Seeded reset validates target altitude and separation.

atomic_goal: Create curriculum knobs for start distance and altitude gap.
acceptance_criteria: Config can make target easier/harder by changing distance and altitude ranges.
suggested_tests: Unit test easy/hard configs change spawn ranges.

atomic_goal: Add early launch-altitude shaping reward that expires after a short window.
acceptance_criteria: Reward encourages gaining useful altitude early but does not dominate pursuit reward.
suggested_tests: Reward term is nonzero only within configured launch window.

atomic_goal: Document expected launch behavior: stabilize, scan upward-forward, acquire target.
acceptance_criteria: README or env docs describe the intended learned sequence.
suggested_tests: Docs mention the sequence explicitly.

atomic_goal: Create a 3D target state with position, velocity, and optional heading.
acceptance_criteria: Target state exists independently from agent and is included in internal env state.
suggested_tests: Reset includes valid target state.

atomic_goal: Implement a simple target hover behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Target can hover with minor drift and stays inside bounds.
suggested_tests: Step target for N frames and assert bounded motion.

atomic_goal: Implement a straight-line target patrol behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Target can move at configured speed and turn/reflect at bounds.
suggested_tests: Target moves consistently over multiple steps.

atomic_goal: Implement a lateral/random patrol target behavior for harder curriculum levels.
acceptance_criteria: Target changes direction using seeded randomness while remaining bounded.
suggested_tests: Same seed produces same target path.

atomic_goal: Expose target behavior selection through config.
acceptance_criteria: Config can select hover, straight, or random patrol.
suggested_tests: Parameterized tests for each target mode.

atomic_goal: Create obstacle primitive classes or dictionaries for cylinders, spheres, and boxes.
acceptance_criteria: Each primitive has position, size, collision helper, and render/debug metadata.
suggested_tests: Unit tests instantiate all primitive types.

atomic_goal: Implement tree trunk obstacles as vertical cylinders.
acceptance_criteria: Tree trunks have radius, height, base position, and collision with rotor span.
suggested_tests: Known collision/noncollision cases pass.

atomic_goal: Implement tree canopy obstacles as spheres or ellipsoids.
acceptance_criteria: Canopies affect collision and occlusion separately from trunks.
suggested_tests: Known canopy collision/noncollision cases pass.

atomic_goal: Implement seeded random obstacle generation.
acceptance_criteria: Reset creates configurable obstacle count with no immediate spawn collisions.
suggested_tests: Seeded resets match and spawn clearance is valid.

atomic_goal: Add minimum clearance rules around agent and target spawn zones.
acceptance_criteria: No obstacle spawns too close to initial agent or target position.
suggested_tests: Spawn many seeds and assert clearance constraints.

atomic_goal: Expose obstacle density through curriculum level.
acceptance_criteria: Curriculum can run with 0, few, medium, or dense obstacles.
suggested_tests: Configs generate expected obstacle count ranges.

atomic_goal: Add near-obstacle clearance penalty before collision.
acceptance_criteria: Reward has a smooth penalty as rotor span approaches obstacle clearance threshold.
suggested_tests: Reward term becomes more negative near obstacle.

atomic_goal: Terminate or fail episodes on obstacle collision.
acceptance_criteria: Collision sets collision flag, failure flag, and terminal state according to config.
suggested_tests: Force collision and assert done/failure info.

atomic_goal: Implement forward/upward-biased vision cone from agent yaw and pitch bias.
acceptance_criteria: Target visibility requires range and angle within sensor cone.
suggested_tests: Place target inside/outside cone and assert visibility.

atomic_goal: Add configurable upward scan pitch bias.
acceptance_criteria: Sensor cone can point slightly upward from horizontal using config.
suggested_tests: Changing pitch bias changes visibility for elevated target.

atomic_goal: Hide exact target relative position when target is not visible.
acceptance_criteria: Observation uses zeros/sentinel for target vector when not visible while preserving target_visible flag.
suggested_tests: Observation differs correctly for visible vs hidden target.

atomic_goal: Track last seen target bearing/direction.
acceptance_criteria: Env stores last seen vector and exposes it in observation after target is lost.
suggested_tests: Make target visible then hidden and assert last_seen persists.

atomic_goal: Track time since target was last seen.
acceptance_criteria: Observation includes normalized time_since_seen.
suggested_tests: Assert counter resets on visibility and increments when hidden.

atomic_goal: Implement simple obstacle ray/proximity sensor.
acceptance_criteria: Observation includes fixed number of ray distances around/forward of drone, normalized to sensor range.
suggested_tests: Known obstacle in ray returns expected shorter distance.

atomic_goal: Block target visibility when obstacle occludes line of sight.
acceptance_criteria: Obstacle between agent and target can make target_visible false.
suggested_tests: Line-of-sight test with blocker passes.

atomic_goal: Add optional observation noise for target bearing/range and obstacle rays.
acceptance_criteria: Noise is disabled by default and enabled through config/curriculum.
suggested_tests: Seeded noisy observations are reproducible.

atomic_goal: Add distance-progress reward based on previous distance to target.
acceptance_criteria: Reward is positive when agent gets closer and negative/zero when moving away, bounded by config.
suggested_tests: Synthetic positions produce expected sign.

atomic_goal: Add target-visible reward.
acceptance_criteria: Small reward is applied while target is visible in the sensor cone.
suggested_tests: Visible target gives visible reward term.

atomic_goal: Add reacquisition reward after losing the target.
acceptance_criteria: Reward fires when target_visible changes from false back to true after at least one lost step.
suggested_tests: Visibility transition test confirms reward.

atomic_goal: Add time penalty per step.
acceptance_criteria: Each nonterminal step includes small negative time cost.
suggested_tests: Step reward_terms includes time_penalty.

atomic_goal: Add smooth-control penalty.
acceptance_criteria: Large action changes or high acceleration incur small penalty.
suggested_tests: Repeated jerky actions produce lower reward than smooth actions.

atomic_goal: Implement capture radius condition.
acceptance_criteria: Agent is considered in capture zone when distance_to_target <= capture_radius.
suggested_tests: Known positions inside/outside capture radius pass.

atomic_goal: Implement hold-for-N-steps success instead of instant terminal success.
acceptance_criteria: Episode succeeds only after staying within capture radius for configured hold steps.
suggested_tests: Enter for one step only does not succeed; hold N steps succeeds.

atomic_goal: Add terminal success reward when hold condition is met.
acceptance_criteria: Large positive reward fires once on successful hold completion.
suggested_tests: Reward term fires only on final success step.

atomic_goal: Add crash and out-of-bounds penalties.
acceptance_criteria: Terminal failure rewards are strongly negative and named in reward_terms.
suggested_tests: Crash/OOB tests show negative terminal reward.

atomic_goal: Add a reward sanity script for hand-authored scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Script prints reward terms for closer/farther/visible/hidden/collision/success cases.
suggested_tests: Run script and inspect expected signs.

atomic_goal: Define curriculum levels 0 through 5 in config.
acceptance_criteria: Levels progressively add 3D, target motion, obstacles, FOV limits, occlusion, and noise.
suggested_tests: Docs/table lists every level and enabled features.

atomic_goal: Implement curriculum config factory.
acceptance_criteria: Function returns env config for a given curriculum level.
suggested_tests: Parameterized test validates feature toggles by level.

atomic_goal: Create a minimal train command for v2 curriculum level 0.
acceptance_criteria: Command trains or smoke-runs with no obstacles and no perception noise.
suggested_tests: Run short training/smoke test without crashing.

atomic_goal: Create a minimal eval command for trained/random policy.
acceptance_criteria: Eval runs fixed seeds and records success, collision, timeout, and mean reward.
suggested_tests: Eval command produces a metrics summary.

atomic_goal: Log per-episode metrics to CSV.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics CSV includes seed, curriculum_level, success, collision, timeout, reward, steps, visibility_ratio, mean_clearance.
suggested_tests: CSV exists and has required columns after eval.

atomic_goal: Add checkpoint naming convention that includes env version and curriculum level.
acceptance_criteria: Checkpoints cannot be confused with v1 checkpoints.
suggested_tests: Saved checkpoint path includes v2 and level.

atomic_goal: Implement a top-down debug render.
acceptance_criteria: Render shows agent, target, obstacles, capture radius, and vision cone projection.
suggested_tests: Manual render smoke test produces image/window.

atomic_goal: Implement a side-view debug render for altitude behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Render shows z-axis, launch height, target altitude, and obstacles.
suggested_tests: Manual side-view render shows altitude differences.

atomic_goal: Add a debug episode recorder for GIF or frame sequence if project already supports rendering.
acceptance_criteria: Recorder can save a short episode visualization for review.
suggested_tests: Run one random-policy episode and save frames/GIF.

atomic_goal: Add optional verbose step debug output for reward terms and visibility.
acceptance_criteria: Verbose mode prints or logs compact diagnostics without spamming by default.
suggested_tests: Enable verbose for 5 steps and see diagnostics.

atomic_goal: Add reset determinism tests.
acceptance_criteria: Same seed produces same observation and obstacle layout; different seeds usually differ.
suggested_tests: pytest reset determinism test passes.

atomic_goal: Add action/observation space compliance tests.
acceptance_criteria: reset and step outputs are contained in observation_space; sampled actions are accepted.
suggested_tests: pytest space compliance test passes.

atomic_goal: Add dynamics limit tests.
acceptance_criteria: Velocity, acceleration, yaw, and bounds behavior respect config caps.
suggested_tests: pytest dynamics tests pass.

atomic_goal: Add obstacle collision and clearance tests.
acceptance_criteria: Known geometry cases validate collision, near miss, and clearance values.
suggested_tests: pytest geometry tests pass.

atomic_goal: Add perception visibility tests.
acceptance_criteria: Known target placements validate FOV, range, upward bias, and hidden states.
suggested_tests: pytest visibility tests pass.

atomic_goal: Add occlusion tests.
acceptance_criteria: Obstacle line-of-sight blockers hide target when occlusion is enabled.
suggested_tests: pytest occlusion tests pass.

atomic_goal: Add reward sign tests.
acceptance_criteria: Closer, visible, reacquire, collision, and success scenarios produce expected reward signs.
suggested_tests: pytest reward tests pass.

atomic_goal: Add episode lifecycle tests.
acceptance_criteria: Success, collision, out-of-bounds, and timeout terminate/truncate correctly.
suggested_tests: pytest lifecycle tests pass.

atomic_goal: Add a short random-policy rollout smoke test.
acceptance_criteria: Random policy can run multiple episodes without NaN, shape errors, or crashes.
suggested_tests: pytest random rollout smoke test passes.

atomic_goal: Keep single-agent training path as default but design state containers to allow N friendly drones later.
acceptance_criteria: Code does not hard-code impossible-to-extend singletons where a list/container is reasonable.
suggested_tests: Code review confirms no unnecessary hard-coded singleton blockers.

atomic_goal: Add docs for future friendly-drone observation fields without enabling multi-agent training yet.
acceptance_criteria: Docs specify future fields: nearby friendly bearing/distance, agent id/role, optional comm vector.
suggested_tests: Docs include future swarm observation notes.

atomic_goal: Reserve config names for future friendly-drone collision and spacing penalties.
acceptance_criteria: Config/doc notes future names but leaves them disabled.
suggested_tests: Config/docs contain disabled future swarm knobs.

atomic_goal: Document that swarm work is deferred until single-drone v2 success metrics are stable.
acceptance_criteria: README says swarm is future work, not part of this implementation pass.
suggested_tests: Docs include deferred swarm section.

atomic_goal: Create an ENV_SPEC.md describing state, action, observation, reward, termination, and curriculum.
acceptance_criteria: Spec is clear enough for Qwen/Codex to audit without reading every source file.
suggested_tests: Spec file exists and matches implementation names.

atomic_goal: Create a TEST_PLAN.md for v2.
acceptance_criteria: Test plan maps major feature areas to concrete pytest or smoke commands.
suggested_tests: Test plan contains commands and expected outputs.

atomic_goal: Create a CHANGELOG entry for v2.
acceptance_criteria: Changelog summarizes environment changes and safe scope.
suggested_tests: Changelog entry exists.

atomic_goal: Run the full local test suite after implementation.
acceptance_criteria: All relevant tests pass or failures are documented with cause and next fix.
suggested_tests: pytest output captured in notes.

atomic_goal: Run one short training smoke test and one eval smoke test.
acceptance_criteria: Training and eval commands complete on local machine with no crashes.
suggested_tests: Command outputs show completion.

atomic_goal: Prepare a Qwen thermonuclear debugging review handoff.
acceptance_criteria: A prompt/file tells Qwen exactly what to inspect: invariants, reward hacking, geometry bugs, determinism, tests, and docs mismatch.
suggested_tests: Review handoff file exists.
